query:
SELECT
          s.station_cd,
          l.average_distance,
            POINT(s.lat, s.lon) <-> POINT($1, $2) AS distance
        FROM stations AS s
        JOIN lines AS l ON l.line_cd = s.line_cd
        WHERE
          s.e_status = 0
        ORDER BY 
          distance
        LIMIT 
          1
